# SI-100 information sheet

Use this as a prep sheet before filing the actual California `SI-100`.

Official filing hub:

- https://bizfileonline.sos.ca.gov/

## Information to gather

- Exact legal corporate name: `Economics of Generative AI Research Lab`
- California entity number: `[ENTITY NUMBER AFTER FILING]`
- Secretary of State file date: `[DATE]`
- Principal executive office address: `320B 2nd Ave, San Francisco, California 94118`
- Business mailing address: `320B 2nd Ave, San Francisco, California 94118`
- California street address, if different: `Same as above`
- Chief Executive Officer name/address: `Nikita Tkachenko / 320B 2nd Ave, San Francisco, California 94118`
- Secretary name/address: `Jake Cosgrove / 320B 2nd Ave, San Francisco, California 94118`
- Chief Financial Officer name/address: `Jake Cosgrove / 320B 2nd Ave, San Francisco, California 94118`
- Agent for service of process: `Nikita Tkachenko / 320B 2nd Ave, San Francisco, California 94118`

## Timing

- Initial filing: within 90 days after registration.
- Later filings: every 2 years in the applicable filing window.
